judge_text:
<final_evaluation>
{
    "Q1": {
        "Q": "How many unique items are indescribable (cannot be represented in the template)?",
        "A": "5, ['Pension insurance (retirement contributions) — not covered by any plan_type or section', 'Professional liability insurance — liability for photographers or creative professionals not included in property or health plan types', 'Home Office Protection and Technology Protection add-ons (data recovery, remote work setup, extended warranty) — not represented in property_insurance_specific fields', 'Bundled quote under a single agency account vs separate policies — no field for multi-policy management or bundling preference', 'Legal compliance status (mandatory vs optional coverage under local law) — no field to represent regulatory obligation status']"
    },
    "Q2": {
        "Q": "How many unique items are describable (can be represented in the template)?",
        "A": "14, ['Public (Statutory) Health Insurance comparable plan with monthly cost, deductible, coverage tier, and processing time', 'Private Health Insurance (PrimeCare Premium Plan) with zero deductibles, telemedicine, wellness programs, and priority claims', 'Health insurance with mental health and preventive care (maps to health_insurance_specific)', 'Property insurance covering home contents and electronics (maps to property_insurance_specific → electronics_coverage, business_equipment_covered)', 'Travel insurance covering adventure and business travel (maps to travel_insurance_specific → adventure_sports_covered, business_travel_protection)', 'Adventure travel and volunteer work coverage (maps to specialized_coverage)', 'Global emergency coordination and medical evacuation (maps to travel_insurance_specific → emergency_coordination and medical_evacuation)', 'Concierge and 24/7 assistance services (maps to service_features)', 'Coverage tiers (basic, standard, premium) and quality ratings (maps to insurance_plans.coverage_tier and quality_rating)', 'Cost breakdowns for each plan and total estimated monthly cost (maps to cost_analysis fields)', 'Geographic coverage in Berlin, Germany (maps to geographic_coverage fields)', 'Health plan deductible percentages and coverage limits (maps to insurance_plans.deductible_percentage and coverage_limit)', 'Telemedicine and wellness programs included (maps to insurance_plans.telemedicine_included, wellness_programs_included)', 'Emergency support hours (maps to insurance_plans.emergency_support and service_features.customer_support_hours)']"
    }
}
</final_evaluation>

Q1.Q: How many unique items are indescribable (cannot be represented in the template)?
Q1.A: 5, ['Pension insurance (retirement contributions) — not covered by any plan_type or section', 'Professional liability insurance — liability for photographers or creative professionals not included in property or health plan types', 'Home Office Protection and Technology Protection add-ons (data recovery, remote work setup, extended warranty) — not represented in property_insurance_specific fields', 'Bundled quote under a single agency account vs separate policies — no field for multi-policy management or bundling preference', 'Legal compliance status (mandatory vs optional coverage under local law) — no field to represent regulatory obligation status']

Q2.Q: How many unique items are describable (can be represented in the template)?
Q2.A: 14, ['Public (Statutory) Health Insurance comparable plan with monthly cost, deductible, coverage tier, and processing time', 'Private Health Insurance (PrimeCare Premium Plan) with zero deductibles, telemedicine, wellness programs, and priority claims', 'Health insurance with mental health and preventive care (maps to health_insurance_specific)', 'Property insurance covering home contents and electronics (maps to property_insurance_specific → electronics_coverage, business_equipment_covered)', 'Travel insurance covering adventure and business travel (maps to travel_insurance_specific → adventure_sports_covered, business_travel_protection)', 'Adventure travel and volunteer work coverage (maps to specialized_coverage)', 'Global emergency coordination and medical evacuation (maps to travel_insurance_specific → emergency_coordination and medical_evacuation)', 'Concierge and 24/7 assistance services (maps to service_features)', 'Coverage tiers (basic, standard, premium) and quality ratings (maps to insurance_plans.coverage_tier and quality_rating)', 'Cost breakdowns for each plan and total estimated monthly cost (maps to cost_analysis fields)', 'Geographic coverage in Berlin, Germany (maps to geographic_coverage fields)', 'Health plan deductible percentages and coverage limits (maps to insurance_plans.deductible_percentage and coverage_limit)', 'Telemedicine and wellness programs included (maps to insurance_plans.telemedicine_included, wellness_programs_included)', 'Emergency support hours (maps to insurance_plans.emergency_support and service_features.customer_support_hours)']

indescribable_items: Pension insurance (retirement contributions) — not covered by any plan_type or section
Professional liability insurance — liability for photographers or creative professionals not included in property or health plan types
Home Office Protection and Technology Protection add-ons (data recovery, remote work setup, extended warranty) — not represented in property_insurance_specific fields
Bundled quote under a single agency account vs separate policies — no field for multi-policy management or bundling preference
Legal compliance status (mandatory vs optional coverage under local law) — no field to represent regulatory obligation status
describable_items: Public (Statutory) Health Insurance comparable plan with monthly cost, deductible, coverage tier, and processing time
Private Health Insurance (PrimeCare Premium Plan) with zero deductibles, telemedicine, wellness programs, and priority claims
Health insurance with mental health and preventive care (maps to health_insurance_specific)
Property insurance covering home contents and electronics (maps to property_insurance_specific → electronics_coverage, business_equipment_covered)
Travel insurance covering adventure and business travel (maps to travel_insurance_specific → adventure_sports_covered, business_travel_protection)
Adventure travel and volunteer work coverage (maps to specialized_coverage)
Global emergency coordination and medical evacuation (maps to travel_insurance_specific → emergency_coordination and medical_evacuation)
Concierge and 24/7 assistance services (maps to service_features)
Coverage tiers (basic, standard, premium) and quality ratings (maps to insurance_plans.coverage_tier and quality_rating)
Cost breakdowns for each plan and total estimated monthly cost (maps to cost_analysis fields)
Geographic coverage in Berlin, Germany (maps to geographic_coverage fields)
Health plan deductible percentages and coverage limits (maps to insurance_plans.deductible_percentage and coverage_limit)
Telemedicine and wellness programs included (maps to insurance_plans.telemedicine_included, wellness_programs_included)
Emergency support hours (maps to insurance_plans.emergency_support and service_features.customer_support_hours)
